prompt_text:
Create a realistic, presentation-quality product photograph of a single Levoit Core 300 Air Purifier White in the Air Purifiers category.

Render the product as:
A compact, white air purifier that effectively cleans the air in spaces up to 1,073 ft² while maintaining low noise levels of 22dB.

Strongly preserve these evidence-backed visual details:
Dimensions; Weight

Scene requirements:
- centered composition
- neutral seamless studio background
- realistic product photography lighting
- single product only
- no lifestyle scene and no extra accessories unless directly supported by evidence

Explicitly avoid:
avoid speculating on product features; avoid unsupported claims about materials; centered composition; neutral or studio background; no extra accessories unless explicitly supported; realistic product photography; single product only

Also avoid mismatches between listing expectation and review reality:
Do not add unsupported embellishments or misleading scale cues.
negative_prompt: avoid speculating on product features; avoid unsupported claims about materials; centered composition; neutral or studio background; no extra accessories unless explicitly supported; realistic product photography; single product only
negative_constraints: no extra accessories unless explicitly supported
